args.query: SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) AS average_rating FROM review WHERE gmap_id IN ('gmap_25', 'gmap_33', 'gmap_24', 'gmap_20', 'gmap_21') GROUP BY gmap_id HAVING AVG(rating) >= 4.0;

exec_args.sql: SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) AS average_rating FROM review WHERE gmap_id IN ('gmap_25', 'gmap_33', 'gmap_24', 'gmap_20', 'gmap_21') GROUP BY gmap_id HAVING AVG(rating) >= 4.0;

args.code:
import pandas as pd

business_info = [{'gmap_id': 'gmap_25', 'name': 'Elite Massage'}, {'gmap_id': 'gmap_33', 'name': 'Happy Spa & Massage (Formerly Hawaii Massage & Spa)'}, {'gmap_id': 'gmap_24', 'name': 'SUSY massage'}, {'gmap_id': 'gmap_20', 'name': 'Aurora Massage'}, {'gmap_id': 'gmap_21', 'name': 'Orient Massage'}]
average_ratings = [{'gmap_id': 'gmap_20', 'average_rating': '4.178571428571429'}, {'gmap_id': 'gmap_25', 'average_rating': '5.0'}]

df_business = pd.DataFrame(business_info)
df_ratings = pd.DataFrame(average_ratings)

merged_df = pd.merge(df_business, df_ratings, on='gmap_id')

result = merged_df[['name', 'average_rating']].to_json(orient='records')

print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)

df_business = pd.DataFrame(business_info)
df_ratings = pd.DataFrame(average_ratings)

merged_df = pd.merge(df_business, df_ratings, on='gmap_id')

result = merged_df[['name', 'average_rating']].to_json(orient='records')

print('__RESULT__:')
